pageTimings.text:
Luna read out the race rules.
The course: from the Hollow Oak to the Crystal Stream to the Tumblerock Cliffs and back.
Everyone was at the starting line.
Everyone was ready.
Mostly.

They were off.
Pip ran.
Fern flew.
Stone trotted.
Dewdrop glided.
Wren ran and read her spell book.
Flint took a very confident turn left.

Flint went left.
Then left again.
Then the Fog Marsh was ahead of him.
"I am taking a scenic route," said Flint.
There was no one to hear him.

Wren found a speed spell.
She cast it.
It worked on everyone near her.
Everyone shot forward very fast.
Except Wren.
She watched them all go.

Glimmer could not stop.
Glimmer hit Spark.
Sparkles went everywhere.
They both kept moving.
Very fast.
In new directions.

Stone hit a root.
Stone began to fall.
This took a while.
Stone was very large.
Stone fell slowly.
Magnificently.
Like a small cliff sitting down.

Pip reached the Crystal Stream.
He leaped from stone to stone.
One stone was slippery.
Pip went in.
He came out the other side.
Still running.
Very wet.

Halfway through, everyone was somewhere different.
Pip was wet.
Stone was standing up again.
Spark had lost his hat.
Flint was not visible.
Wren was still walking.

Dewdrop crossed the finish line.
She had glided the whole way.
She was not wet.
She was not ruffled.
"Finished," said Dewdrop.

Everyone finished.
Eventually.
Pip was still damp.
Spark had found his hat.
Stone had found a bruise.
Flint arrived from the wrong direction.

Luna counted everyone.
Everyone was back.
Then there was a rumbling.
Burrow came up through the ground.
Right beside the finish line.
He did not look tired.

Dewdrop won a gold leaf for finishing.
Burrow won a gold leaf for best route.
"I did not win," said Flint.
"You went to the Fog Marsh," said Pip.
"I saw many things," said Flint.
He was already drawing them.
